caption:
A premium vertical editorial lifestyle photo (Ratio 4:5, 1080×1350) captured in soft natural daylight from a clean, high-end kitchen interior. Shot on Fujifilm GFX 100S, 50 mm f/2.8. The camera is positioned in a tilted-up diagonal angle, suggesting action and emotional uplift.

The subject is a modern couple, aged 28–38, both dressed casually yet stylishly, sharing a moment while preparing a healthy meal together. One holds a tablet displaying the NutriVerse app, while the other sprinkles herbs onto a fresh dish — a representation of the collaborative spirit of healthy eating. Their facial expressions convey joy and teamwork, like a couple enjoying the process of cooking together.

Overlaid in negative space to the upper left, in clean editorial typography, is the promotional phrase:
“O que o NutriVerse faz por você?” — set in Inter Medium, Dark Gray (#111827), small caps, minimal letter-spacing.

Color accents are expertly controlled: a subtle Neon Lime (#A6F000) glows faintly from the tablet screen or reflects in a kitchen surface. The kitchen behind is bathed in white matte tones (#FFFFFF) with no visual clutter. Their clothing is neutral, modern, understated.

Textures include smooth skin, vibrant vegetables, colorful dishware, and brushed metal, ensuring tactile realism. Micro-bloom and subtle lens flare near the tablet edge hint at a soft tech presence. Gentle bokeh in the background enhances focus without distraction.

This composition blends functionality and calm aspiration — evoking the feeling of wellness powered by technology.

A premium vertical social media post (4:5) with a cinematic, high-contrast aesthetic. The upper 60% of the image shows a realistic, literal scene depicting the situation described in the text: a dynamic scene in a cozy, well-lit office where a young female psychologist (20-30 years old, in casual attire) confidently engages with a client seated across from her, her expression calm and assuring, as she actively listens and takes notes, dramatic directional lighting, shallow depth of field, dark textured background, cinematic atmosphere, ultra-realistic, high-detail, dramatic mood, small particles and dust floating in the air. 

The lower 40% of the image fades into a dense black-to-deep-purple gradient, creating a solid base for bold typography without abruptly cutting the image. 

Centered, bold motivational typography in ALL CAPS, using a condensed sans-serif style similar to Bebas Neue or Champion Gothic (not referencing specific font names, only style). 

Text content (Portuguese), centered and stacked, with tight line spacing and strong hierarchy: 

"A DIFERENÇA ENTRE UM PSICÓLOGO COMUM E UM PSICÓLOGO CONFIANTE? ISSO AQUI."

Color usage: • Main text in pure white • Strategic emphasis words in deep rich purple (not neon) Use emphasis sparingly on 2–3 key words only 

Letter spacing slightly condensed, dense and impactful text block. Text occupies approximately one-third of the total image height. Generous side margins (around 10%), no text touching edges.

No logo instruction provided

Overall style: • Editorial, cinematic, premium • Dark psychology aesthetic • Strong emotional impact • Clean, modern, high-end • Designed to feel authoritative, reflective, and professional

MANDATORY RESTRICTIONS: • Lighting must remain dramatic • Contrast must be high • No clutter • No stock-photo look • No cartoon style • No illustrative icons • No emojis • No exaggerated neon colors • NEVER include hex color codes as visible text in the image • DO NOT render technical headers like "PART 1" as text • Any color reference must be applied visually, not written as text

BRAND COLORS (STRICTLY ENFORCE THESE PURPLE TONES): - #9446C4 (Deep Purple): Use for shadows, depth, and the main base gradient. - #A158CC (Medium Purple): Use for mid-tones and transitions. - #AF67D6 (Vivid Purple): Use for vibrant accents and lighting effects. - #BC79E0 (Light Purple): Use for highlights, rim lighting, and premium details. - DO NOT use generic purple. USE THESE EXACT HEX CODES to guide the color palette.

caption:
**TEMA / CONTEÚDO:**
Prazer Sem Culpa + Identificação Emocional

**HEADLINE:**
Delicie-se Sem Peso na Consciência

**SUBHEADLINE:**
Versões saudáveis das suas receitas favoritas

**FRASE DE PRODUTO:**
NutriVerse adapta receitas ao seu objetivo

**FRASE IDENTITÁRIA:**
Saboreie a vida com equilíbrio

**CTA:**
Experimente uma nova forma de comer

**DESCRIÇÃO DA IMAGEM:**
Mesa minimalista com pratos de sobremesas tradicionais e versões saudáveis criadas pelo app. Pessoa olhando satisfeita para o smartphone. Estilo visual clean, paleta branca predominante com toques de dark gray e neon lime. Realista, sem influencer vibe.
Every small step plants the seeds of transformation. 🌱 Embrace the journey toward your true potential with clarity and discipline. #InnerBoost #StepForward #PersonalGrowth
Unlock your potential by navigating your internal compass. 🌟🌱 #InnerGrowth #StartWithin #InnerBoost

**TEMA / CONTEÚDO:**
Sabor sem culpa + identificação emocional

**HEADLINE:**
Sabor doce, culpa zero

**SUBHEADLINE:**
Receitas que mantêm a dieta

**FRASE DE PRODUTO:**
Transforme doces em opções saudáveis

**FRASE IDENTITÁRIA:**
Desfrute cada mordida sem medo

**CTA:**
Descubra receitas agora

**DESCRIÇÃO DA IMAGEM:**
Ambiente de cozinha moderna, pessoa sorrindo ao preparar uma sobremesa saudável. Smartphone ao lado mostrando a interface do app NutriVerse com uma receita. Clima acolhedor, visual minimalista, paleta de branco, dark gray e detalhes em neon lime. Visual realista e motivador.

A premium vertical editorial lifestyle photo (Ratio 4:5, 1080×1350) captured in soft natural daylight from a clean, high-end kitchen interior. Shot on Fujifilm GFX 100S, 50 mm f/2.8. The camera is positioned in a tilted-up diagonal angle, suggesting action and emotional uplift.

The subject is a modern, health-conscious man aged 30–40, dressed in casual athletic wear, showcasing a strong yet friendly presence. He holds a smartphone and a beautifully plated healthy dish mid-gesture — the dish reflects the customized meal approach of NutriVerse. His facial expression conveys confidence and pride, like someone who’s just prepared a meal that perfectly fits his dietary goals.

Overlaid in negative space to the upper left, in clean editorial typography, is the promotional phrase:
“O que o NutriVerse faz por você?” — set in Inter Medium, Dark Gray (#111827), small caps, minimal letter-spacing.

Color accents are expertly controlled: a subtle Neon Lime (#A6F000) glows faintly from the device screen or reflects in the dish presentation. The kitchen behind is bathed in white matte tones (#FFFFFF) with no visual clutter. His clothing is neutral, modern, understated.

Textures include smooth skin, glossy dishware, fresh ingredients, and brushed metal, ensuring tactile realism. Micro-bloom and subtle lens flare near the phone edge hint at a soft tech presence. Gentle bokeh in the background enhances focus without distraction.

This composition blends functionality and calm aspiration — evoking the feeling of wellness powered by technology.
Embrace your journey of self-improvement with patience and compassion. Remember, progress isn't about perfection—it's about growth. 🌟 #InnerBoost #SelfImprovement #GrowthMindset
Transform overwhelm into clarity. Harness the power of focus to unlock your true potential. 🚀✨ #InnerBoost #FocusFuel

**⏱️ Sua Semana Alimentar em Minutos!**

Organize sua alimentação e ganhe tempo para o que realmente importa.

👇👇👇

📅 **1️⃣ Planejamento Simples**
Use IA para organizar suas refeições da semana em questão de minutos.

🥗 **2️⃣ Alinhado aos Seus Objetivos**
Escolha entre emagrecer, ganhar massa ou manter a saúde.

🍲 **3️⃣ Aproveite o Que Já Tem**
Modo despensa: utilize ingredientes que já estão na sua cozinha.

🔄 **4️⃣ Reduza Desperdício**
Planejamento inteligente significa menos comida jogada fora.

📈 **5️⃣ Acompanhe seu Progresso**
Veja resultados sem estresse e com consistência.

Transforme a forma como você planeja suas refeições com o NutriVerse!
Unlock the power of awareness. Embrace your emotions and transform your reactions into intentional responses. 🌟 #InnerBoost #EmotionalMastery
